title: meToad's Project
description: a Datapack that adds some new "rpg" style features to minecraft
body:
![Deep Dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad9bd8da8229a8f1bb06178c7eaa87ad26a62de0.png) **Note: Downloading this contain Datapack AND Resource Pack (Assuming you know how to setup those)** --- ## meToad's Project | Deep Dungeon (Part II) meToad's Project is a Datapack that Introduce RPG Elements to Minecraft! By Adding Stronger Mobs than the Original with Powerful Weapons to Take Them Out!
❓What does this datapack add? Custom Structure (2) with rare rooms and a mini boss.
Items (22, Ranging from enchantments, armor, ingredients and even weapons!).
Potions (2).
Mobs (11 Common, 4 Rare and 1 Epic).
So far this datapack focused on 2 mob, in future it will focus on other mobs!
👀 Future Updates 🌙🌑
🎥 Video Link
